name: High Traffic Congestion in Risk Zone
description: Detects sustained high-severity traffic congestion in high-risk zones. Uses enriched data to assess zone risk level and available infrastructure response.
epl_rule: SELECT zone, COUNT(*) as incident_count, AVG(average_speed_kmh) as avg_speed, (SELECT enrichment.zone_context.risk_level FROM TrafficEvent AS first).get(0) as risk_level FROM TrafficEvent(type='congestion', severity in ('high', 'critical')).win:time(10 min) GROUP BY zone HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2 AND (SELECT enrichment.zone_context.risk_level FROM TrafficEvent AS first).get(0) in ('high', 'critical')
notes: Requires enriched events with zone context from Enricher

name: Critical Accident with Insufficient Emergency Response
description: Detects critical traffic accidents in zones with limited hospital or police access. Uses enriched geographic context to assess response capability.
epl_rule: SELECT t.zone, t.type, t.severity, t.injuries, t.enrichment.zone_context.hospitals as nearby_hospitals, t.enrichment.zone_context.avg_response_time_min as response_time_min FROM TrafficEvent(t) WHERE t.type='accident' AND t.severity='critical' AND (t.enrichment.zone_context.hospitals.size() = 0 OR t.enrichment.zone_context.avg_response_time_min > 15)
notes: Criticality increases if zone has few hospitals or slow response times

name: Severe Weather in Critical Infrastructure Zone
description: Detects severe weather events in critical zones (airport, industrial areas). Uses enriched zone risk level to escalate severity.
epl_rule: SELECT * FROM PATTERN [c=ClimateEvent(type='storm', severity='high') -> t=TrafficEvent(type='accident')] WHERE c.zone = t.zone AND c.enrichment.zone_context.risk_level in ('high', 'critical')
notes: Storm + accident = higher severity if in critical zone (airport) vs low-risk zone

name: Poor Air Quality Triggers Health Emergencies in High-Density Zone
description: Correlates poor air quality with respiratory/cardiac emergency calls in high-population-density zones. Uses enriched population density to assess impact scope.
epl_rule: SELECT a.zone, a.aqi, h.call_type, COUNT(h) as emergency_calls, a.enrichment.zone_context.population_density as pop_density FROM PATTERN [a=EnvironmentEvent(type='air_quality', severity in ('high', 'critical')) -> h=HealthEvent(type='emergency_call', call_type in ('respiratory', 'cardiac'))].win:time(30 min) WHERE a.zone = h.zone AND a.enrichment.zone_context.population_density = 'very_high' GROUP BY a.zone, a.aqi, h.call_type
notes: Higher alert level in high-density areas (downtown) vs residential

name: Large Crowd Gathering in Zone with Limited Emergency Response
description: Detects large crowds in zones with limited emergency service response capability. Uses enriched data to assess risk based on available infrastructure.
epl_rule: SELECT zone, location, SUM(estimated_population) as total_population, (SELECT enrichment.zone_context.police_stations.size() FROM PopulationEvent AS first).get(0) as police_count, (SELECT enrichment.zone_context.avg_response_time_min FROM PopulationEvent AS first).get(0) as response_time FROM PopulationEvent(type in ('gathering', 'crowd_alert'), severity in ('high', 'critical')).win:time(5 min) GROUP BY zone, location HAVING SUM(estimated_population) > 5000 AND (SELECT enrichment.zone_context.police_stations.size() FROM PopulationEvent AS first).get(0) < 2
notes: Criticality based on police availability and crowd size

name: Emergency Services Potentially Overwhelmed by Multiple Concurrent Calls
description: Detects surge in emergency calls. Uses enriched zone response time baseline to assess if services are overwhelmed.
epl_rule: SELECT zone, COUNT(*) as emergency_count, (SELECT enrichment.zone_context.avg_response_time_min FROM HealthEvent AS first).get(0) as baseline_response_time FROM HealthEvent(type='emergency_call', severity in ('high', 'critical')).win:time(10 min) GROUP BY zone HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5
notes: Compares current call volume against zone baseline response time

name: Critical Pollution Spike in Industrial Zone
description: Alerts on critical pollution in industrial zones with hazmat risk. Uses enriched zone type context.
epl_rule: SELECT zone, type, severity, aqi FROM EnvironmentEvent(severity='critical' OR (type='air_quality' AND aqi > 400)).win:time(1 min) WHERE enrichment.zone_context.risk_level = 'high'
notes: Industrial zones get higher alert priority

name: Multi-Domain Crisis in Critical Infrastructure Zone
description: Complex pattern: simultaneous critical events (traffic + weather + population) in zones with critical infrastructure (airport). Maximum severity alert.
epl_rule: SELECT t.zone, COUNT(*) as event_count, t.enrichment.zone_context.risk_level as zone_risk FROM PATTERN [t=TrafficEvent(severity='critical') and c=ClimateEvent(severity='critical') and p=PopulationEvent(severity='critical')] WHERE t.zone = c.zone AND c.zone = p.zone AND t.enrichment.zone_context.risk_level = 'critical'
notes: Maximum severity: multiple domains + critical zone (e.g., airport)
